message:
feat(workers): Add rch workers setup command for automated provisioning

Implements the unified setup command that combines binary deployment
and toolchain synchronization into a single workflow. Supports:

- rch workers setup <worker-id> for specific worker
- rch workers setup --all for fleet-wide provisioning
- --dry-run to preview actions
- --skip-binary / --skip-toolchain for partial setup

The setup_single_worker helper handles per-worker orchestration,
calling deploy_binary_for_setup and check/install_remote_toolchain.

Completes bead remote_compilation_helper-hmu.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
